2604.25534.title: Sample-efficient Neuro-symbolic Proximal Policy Optimization
2604.25534.paper_summary: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) algorithms often require a large amount of data and struggle in sparse-reward domains with long planning horizons and multiple sub-goals. In this paper, we propose a neuro-symbolic extension of Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) that transfers partial logical policy specifications learned in easier instances to guide learning in more challenging settings. We introduce two integrations of symbolic guidance: (i) H-PPO-Product, which biases the action distribution at sampling time, and (ii) H-PPO-SymLoss, which augments the PPO loss with a symbolic regularization term. We evaluate our methods on three benchmarks (OfficeWorld, WaterWorld, and DoorKey), showing consistently faster learning and higher return at convergence than PPO and a Reward Machine baseline, also under imperfect symbolic knowledge.
2604.25534.paper_summary_zh: 深度強化學習 (DRL) 演算法通常需要大量數據，並且在稀疏獎勵的領域中，面臨長期規劃和多個子目標的挑戰。在本文中，我們提出了一種近端策略優化 (PPO) 的神經符號擴展，該擴展將在較簡單實例中學習到的部分邏輯策略規範轉移到更具挑戰性的環境中以指導學習。我們介紹了兩種符號指導的整合方式：(i) H-PPO-Product，該方法在取樣時偏向行動分佈，以及 (ii) H-PPO-SymLoss，該方法用符號正則化項增強了PPO損失。我們在三個基準測試（OfficeWorld、WaterWorld 和 DoorKey）上評估我們的方法，顯示出比PPO和獎勵機器基準在收斂時具有一致的更快學習速度和更高的回報，即使在不完美的符號知識下也是如此。
2604.25534.author: Simone Murari et.al.
2604.25534.authors: Simone Murari, Celeste Veronese, Daniele Meli
